"page.evaluate(fn)
Run arbitrary JS in browser
e.g., getComputedStyle check
or querySelectorAll count"

"Token Violation
e.g., bg !== rgb(0,0,0)
Fix: Check tokens.json
mapping in preset"
"Missing Selector\ne.g., data-testid not found\nFix: Add testid to component"
"Branding Drift\ne.g., title !== Awesome Lists\nFix: Re-state brand in prompt"

"Layout Break
e.g., element not visible
Fix: Regenerate screen
with full token spec"
